# LakazAgri
> Free Android app for farm-to-buyer coordination in Mauritius.

## Site
- Homepage: https://lakazagri.mu/
- Contact: gilbert@mkweli.tech
- Phone: +230 5479 6356

## Product
LakazAgri Phase 1 helps Mauritian farmers post crop availability and lets hotels, supermarkets, restaurants and institutions post demand. Offline-first, built for local districts and villages.

## Related
- Sister product Mkweli AML: https://mkweli.tech/
- App releases: https://github.com/gilbertbouic/lakazAgri/releases
